### User-turn template (per query)

Built by `prompting_harness.build_prompt(query, examples, schema)`. Schematically:

```
Database schema:
<contents of data/flight_database.schema>

Examples:
NL: <retrieved by BM25>
SQL: <gold SQL>
... (k examples)

Now write the SQLite SQL query for the following instruction.
NL: <input>
SQL:
```
